---
title: "Projects"
description: "Research tools, web experiments, and things I've built."
page-layout: full
code-tools: false
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="terminal-window-large">
  <div class="terminal-header-bar">
    <span class="terminal-dot red"></span>
    <span class="terminal-dot yellow"></span>
    <span class="terminal-dot green"></span>
    <code>cole@press:~$ ls -la ~/projects/</code>
  </div>
  <div class="terminal-body">

    <pre class="terminal-listing">drwxr-xr-x  cole  staff  Jan 2026  ai-tools/
drwxr-xr-x  cole  staff  Mar 2026  research-automation/
drwxr-xr-x  cole  staff  Apr 2026  web-experiments/
drwxr-xr-x  cole  staff  Apr 2026  cole-press/</pre>

    <div class="terminal-project-grid">

      <div class="terminal-project-card">
        <div class="card-accent" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff6b6b, #ff9500);"></div>
        <h4>AI Tools</h4>
        <p>Exploring open-source language models and building practical applications for research and clinical workflows.</p>
        <a href="https://github.com/colerehbein" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="terminal-link">View on GitHub →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="terminal-project-card">
        <div class="card-accent" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #00e5ff);"></div>
        <h4>Research Automation</h4>
        <p>Building reproducible analysis pipelines in R and Python. Psychometric analysis, longitudinal data processing, and automated reporting.</p>
        <a href="https://github.com/colerehbein" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="terminal-link">View on GitHub →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="terminal-project-card">
        <div class="card-accent" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a855f7, #ec4899);"></div>
        <h4>Web Experiments</h4>
        <p>Small sites and apps — including this one. Built with Quarto, SCSS, and JavaScript. Terminal aesthetic, monospace typography, and zero frameworks.</p>
        <a href="https://github.com/colerehbein" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="terminal-link">View on GitHub →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="terminal-project-card">
        <div class="card-accent" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, #30e000, #00e5ff);"></div>
        <h4>cole.press</h4>
        <p>This website. A Quarto-powered personal site with a terminal/neofetch aesthetic, self-hosted fonts, and a dark mode that doesn't hurt your eyes.</p>
        <a href="https://github.com/colerehbein/cole_press" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="terminal-link">Source Code →</a>
      </div>

    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
